saints.name: “Surety of Sinners” Icon of the Mother of God of Korets

troparion.text: To you, the ever-flowing source of mercy and Intercessor for sinners, /  O Theotokos, we your unworthy servants, bow down in sorrow, crying out: / “Save us from our troubles, O Sovereign Lady,  /  and by your maternal intercession ask eternal salvation for all of us.”

kontakion.text: As the revered dwelling place of the ineffable Divine nature, beyond words and understanding;  / and an intercessor for sinners, granting grace and healing;  /  as the Mother of Him Who reigns over all,  /  pray to your Son that we may receive mercy on the Day of Judgment.

saints.name: Saint Metrophanes, first Patriarch of Constantinople

troparion.text: In truth you were revealed to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence; / your humility exalted you; your poverty enriched you. / Hierarch Father Metrophanes, / entreat Christ our God that our souls may be saved.

kontakion.text: You clearly taught the faith of Christ, / and by keeping it you truly increased your faithful flock to a multitude; / and so, Metrophanes, you now rejoice with the angels and unceasingly intercede for us all.

saints.name: Righteous Martha and Mary, the sisters of Lazarus

troparion.text: Appearing to the Myrrh-bearing women at the tomb,  the Angel exclaimed:  / “Myrrh is meet for the dead;  /  but Christ has shown Himself a stranger to corruption.   / So proclaim: ‘The Lord is risen, granting the world great mercy.’”

kontakion.text: When You proclaimed “Rejoice” to the Myrrhbearers,  / You caused the lamentation of the foremother Eve to cease by Your Resurrection; O Christ God;  /  commanding Your Apostles to proclaim:  /  “The Savior is risen from the tomb.”

saints.name: Venerable Methodius, Abbot of Peshnosha, Disciple of Venerable Sergius of Radonezh

troparion.text: By a flood of tears you made the desert fertile, / and your longing for God brought forth fruits in abundance. / By the radiance of miracles you illumined the whole universe! / O our holy father Methodius, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

saints.name: Martyrs Frontasius, Severinus, Severian, and Silanus, of Gaul

troparion.text: Your holy martyrs Frontasius, Severinus, Severian, and Silanus, O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

Your holy martyr Concordius, O Lord, / through his sufferings has received an incorruptible crown from You, our God. / For having Your strength, he laid low his adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through his intercessions, save our souls!

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “You sought the heights...”)
You appeared as a bright star announcing Christ with your radiance,  / which is repulsive to this world, O Martyr Concordius;  / extinguishing the allure of false gods,  / you enlighten the faithful, /  always interceding for us all.

saints.name: Hieromartyr Astius, Bishop of Dyrrachium in Macedonia

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Astius, entreat Christ God to save our souls.

saints.name: Venerable Father Zosima, Bishop of Babylon

troparion.text: You appeared to your flock as a rule of faith, / an image of humility and a teacher of abstinence. / Because of your lowliness, heaven was opened to you; / because of your poverty, riches were granted to you. / O Holy Bishop Zosima, pray to Christ our God to save our souls!

kontakion.text: You taught and preserved the doctrines of Christ, / greatly increasing the number of your sheep, O holy Zosima. / Therefore you now live with the angels in enjoyment of eternal life, / fervently interceding with Christ for us all.

troparion.text: In you, O Mother, was preserved with exactness what is according to the image; /  for you took up the Cross and followed Christ. /  By so doing, you taught us to disregard the flesh, for it passes away; /  but to care for the soul, since it is immortal.  / Therefore, O Venerable Sophia your spirit rejoices with the Angels.

kontakion.text:
(Podoben: “Having received the grace of healing..”)
Having discarded a bed for rest, for the sake of your love for God, O Mother Sophia, /  and illuminating your spirit with fasting,  / you completely vanquished your enemies;  / and by your intercessions you destroyed the evil schemes of our adversaries.

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Joannicius, entreat Christ God to save our souls.

By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr George, entreat Christ God to save our souls.

Your holy martyrs O Lord, / through their sufferings have received incorruptible crowns from You, our God. / For having Your strength, they laid low their adversaries, / and shattered the powerless boldness of demons. / Through their intercessions, save our souls!

saints.name: New Martyr Archbishop Andronicus of Perm

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, / O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, / you defended the Faith, even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Andronicus entreat Christ God to save our souls.

saints.name: Hieromartyr Joanicus, Metropolitan of Montenegro and the Coast

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Joanicus, entreat Christ God to save our souls.

saints.name: Hieromartyr Savva, Bishop of Upper Karlovac

troparion.text: By sharing in the ways of the Apostles, / you became a successor to their throne. / Through the practice of virtue, you found the way to divine contemplation, O inspired one of God; / by teaching the word of truth without error, you defended the Faith, / even to the shedding of your blood. / Hieromartyr Savva, entreat Christ God to save our souls.
